query:
SELECT 
  id, sceneIndex, status AS mvSceneStatus, taskId, 
  errorMessage, 
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) AS seconds_since_update
FROM musicVideoScenes 
WHERE jobId = 510025 
ORDER BY sceneIndex;
